summary: Frontend-only verification of new advertorial presell page at /pa (PresellPA.jsx). All 6 review items passed: page renders with every required data-testid, attorney section shows Michael Saeedian + MS monogram + credential chips, footer wording reflects that Lemon Pros IS a law firm (disclaimer no longer says 'not a law firm' and contains 'attorney-client relationship'), all 4 footer legal links navigate to /terms, /do-not-sell, /privacy, /contact and render content, pa-make-toyota / pa-final-cta / pa-callout-cta all funnel into /flow/year, and homepage at / still renders normally with public-shell and does not contain /pa content.
critical_code_review_comments: PresellPA.jsx is ~360 lines and self-contained; consider extracting Footer + Attorney card into reusable components later, but acceptable for an advertorial.
Hero/mech/lot images are hardcoded Unsplash/Pexels URLs - acceptable for a marketing landing page but consider moving to constants module if reused.
ATTORNEY_PHOTO constant is empty string; once real photo is added the existing branch with data-testid='pa-attorney-photo' will render automatically - logic verified correct.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 review items for /pa page verified end-to-end via Playwright against preview URL. Disclaimer text: 'Attorney Advertising. This website is for general informational purposes and does not constitute legal advice. Contacting The Lemon Pros does not create an attorney-client relationship...' - verified does NOT contain 'not a law firm'. Footer address verified: '9025 Wilshire Blvd #500, Beverly Hills, CA 90211'. Funnel handoff to /flow/year works from make grid, final CTA, and callout CTA. Homepage at / unaffected (public-shell renders, presell-pa-page absent).
